subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! O ye spiritual friends! The Lord of the worlds hath said in the Qur’an: “A noble pattern have ye in God’s Apostle.”
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی و یاران معنوی خداوند عالمیان در قرآن حکیم میفرماید و لکم فی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @human reality created in the image of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
